holdings.infoBox: AV is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are GE Aerospace stock at 10.71%, RTX Corporation at 8.62%, General Dynamics at 5.12%, Howmet Aerospace at 5.00%, and Lockheed Martin at 4.53%.

overview.description: The Corgi Aerospace & Commercial Aviation ETF (AV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund actively selects companies across the global aerospace and aviation infrastructure sectors. It seeks capital appreciation and combines fundamental analysis, thematic screening, and quantitative methods in selecting securities. AV was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.

data.title: Corgi Funds Launches Record 34 ETFs
data.text: The U.S. ETF industry saw its single-largest new ETF rollout in history when issuer Corgi Funds launched 34 actively managed funds on the Cboe BZX exchange. The new products are a mix of thematic and ...
